programme.desc: Researchers are investigating how animals behave in swarms. Their findings are being applied to robotics, logistics and new models of participation - and are opening up new perspectives for business and democracy.

programme.desc: Women in Latin America are recruited with brutal methods, then enslaved in Europe. A survivor recounts how she was lured to Spain with the promise of a job, then forced into prostitution.

programme.title: Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.desc: For Pierre Chatelain, preparing recipes with mediaeval flavour is a sacred quest that brings pure happiness. Using produce that is authentic, local and seasonal he sets out to surprise our palate with unknown flavours that take us back to the world of yesteryear.

programme.title: E115 - Ready-To-Wear For Spring/Summer 2024

programme.title: E7 - A Life Of Simplicity In The Acadian Forest
programme.desc: Julien is welcomed by Anne Galant who hand-built her house on Prince Edward Island. She shares her story and explains how it led to her living a simple life in a haven of peace and tran-quillity.

E78 - Up Down, Down Up
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po drive the Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Uppy Downy. They have fun going up down, down up!

programme.title: E10 - Messy-Morphosis
programme.desc: Messy monster can't find his caterpillar friends. The garden bush where he left his friends is now covered with pretty butterflies. But where did the caterpillars go? He flutters off to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E43 - Camping
programme.desc: While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend named called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E37 - Andy And The Darkling Beetle
programme.desc: Andy checks out the Darkling Beetle, a nocturnal insect with bright markings. Andy heads to the Namib desert in Africa to discover how a darkling beetle drinks water.

programme.title: E18 - The History Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels get an interactive history lesson from Duggee and a host of famous faces.

programme.title: E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E16 - The Philosophy Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels think about life's big questions, and gain their Philosophy badges.

programme.title: E28 - Ronda Reunion, Spain
programme.desc: Foz tries to play a Spanish guitar, and Xuli is delighted when her first ever souvenir selfie flutters out of it. It shows her on holiday as a child in a Spanish town with her long-lost friend Maria.

programme.title: E28 - Pillow Fill
programme.desc: Scarf Lady helps Sarah & Duck catch the fluffs and puffs to refill their pancaked pillows.

programme.title: E29 - Castle Scribbling
programme.desc: Whilst visiting a Castle, Sarah & Duck's drawings lead them to an exciting discovery.

programme.title: E4 - Carnival
programme.desc: Stanley, Sophie and Benjamin make up a new game, 'Dino-Pirates'. This is such a good game, they use it as inspiration for Stanley's carnival float.

programme.title: E14 - Not A Lemon... A Lem-Ming!
programme.desc: Its not all cats and dogs when it comes to pets. Our talking animals have their own, very silly favourites.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E47 - The Counting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels try the ultimate achievement of counting to 100 to earn their counting badge

programme.title: E18 - Carrot
programme.desc: Carrot sings about being trendy.

programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Return To A Better Tomorrow
programme.desc: Cool and brave, Tong is the most famous big brother. Ha, a loyal follower of Tong, is charged murdering his unfaithful wife's lover. Fortunately, he is saved by Tong's lawyer...

programme.title: Eighth Happiness
programme.desc: Fai, the eldest, has met Fong. Long is a guy with many girl-friends. A girl working in a deparment store has become his target. Sung, is a timid artist. Ying comes into his life...

programme.title: All Night Long
programme.desc: Teacher Wang is being held hostage one night by a bank robber in an all-night shop. Shop attendant Ling-ling and Wang struggle with the badly wounded robber, who dies in the fight. With two more accomplices, the four girls decide to destroy the body and split the $40 million the man has on him. But his gangs catch up with the girls and are about to rape and then kill them...

programme.title: July Rhapsody
programme.desc: Secondary school teacher Lam Yiu-kwok is suffering from a mid-life crisis - his peers have all become more successful than him; his relationship with his wife, Chan Man-ching, is in trouble when her old flame returns, and he finds himself tempted by a 17-year-old student who has a crush on him...

programme.title: The Last Message
programme.desc: Our story begins in the Hang Seng Sanitarium, which has a quite amount of crazy people. Ah Tim is a handy man there and Li is a nurse. Ah Tim has the greatest enthusiasm in his work, especially when he combs through the remains of the deceased and divests them of worldly items like gold fillings. However, his enterprise is spotted by Li, therefore, he has to make it a profit sharing venture. Later on, with the arrival of old Cheng, big fortune comes too. The two is now planning seriously how to get all the valuables from the big guy. However...

programme.title: E1 - New Beginnings
programme.desc: In the heart of Borneo, join the team from the Nyaru Menteng Rescue and Reintroduction Center as they transfer 35 young orphaned orangutans to a protected sanctuary.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The Inter-Governmental Panel on Climate Change estimates that by 2100, an estimated 50% of all the world's species: up to 1 million animals and plant species are at risk.

programme.title: On The Edge Of Chaos
programme.desc: We follow the renovation team as they embark on a mission to breathe a new life into The Magistracy, Hong Kong's former central courthouse.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sinauli
programme.desc: The discovery of a 4000-year old war chariot in Sanauli in Uttar Pradesh have historians and archeologists questioning.

programme.title: E2 - Poland
programme.desc: Sung's dive into the world's car cultures takes him to Poland, a country that emerged from a repressive communist era.

programme.title: E8 - Bulgaria, Greece, Albania - Part 1
programme.desc: In this vibrant city filled with colorful graffiti, she wanders through the streets searching for striking murals while exploring the urban landscape.

programme.title: E3 - Korea
programme.desc: Despite a troubled past of poverty and invasions, Korea has emerged as a car building powerhouse.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Asean·Korea Music Festival <Round In Philippines>
programme.desc: ASEAN·Korea Music Festival is a public cultural diplomacy project that aims to expand cooperation between ASEAN and Korea and foster cultural exchange among young people across Asia through popular music.

programme.title: E73
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E113 - Journey To The Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E261 - Lighthouse Louie / Hiccup Plague
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: E903 - Meet The Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E106 - Gas Station Vacation / Bunny The Barbarian
programme.desc: The Star Family heads to their favorite resort. // Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: E264 - Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: E910 - Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: E265 - Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: E266 - Escape From Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: E112 - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: E205 - Movie Stars / Dr. Smart Science
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob work at the movie theater to watch a new premiere. // With Sandy's guidance, Patrick hosts a science show.

programme.title: E802 - Steeling Thunder / Be Careful What You Fish For
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How To Bag A Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E904 - Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: E303 - A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E109 - Avoid The Void
programme.desc: In The Void, Shadow intercepts Sonic's latest Shatterspace transverse, for a personal face-to-fist encounter. Sonic assumes this Shadow is another distorted prism version of someone he knows until Shadow calls Sonic by name.

programme.title: E534 - Cave The Date
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up a secret underground restaurant in the Man Cave for Charlotte's private dinner with music superstar Jack Swagger. When word gets out that Jack Swagger is in town, some unwanted guests crash the party.

programme.title: E104 - Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: E517 - Much Ado About Noshing / Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: The kids help Dad track down the mystery person who left Lynn's Table a bad review online. // The Action News Team has to cater to Chandler's demands after he buys the club new equipment.

programme.title: E714 - Bye Tanya
programme.desc: Leni must protect her mannequin friend Tanya when her boss, Ms. Carmichael, decides to update Reininger's.

programme.title: E109 - Avoid The Void
programme.desc: In The Void, Shadow intercepts Sonic's latest Shatterspace transverse, for a personal face-to-fist encounter. Sonic assumes this Shadow is another distorted prism version of someone he knows until Shadow calls Sonic by name.

programme.title: E265 - Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: E109 - Mica's Robot
programme.desc: Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.desc: In The Void, Shadow intercepts Sonic's latest Shatterspace transverse, for a personal face-to-fist encounter. Sonic assumes this Shadow is another distorted prism version of someone he knows until Shadow calls Sonic by name.

programme.title: E6 - 32 Cooks Persist
programme.desc: Host Terry Crews challenges 31 of the remaining 32 home cooks with a gameday grub competition and a cook's choice battle.

programme.title: E9 - The 'Just In Case' Dress
programme.desc: Red already bought a 'just in case' dress at another salon, but she doesn't want to settle. Can she find a dress that's 'just the one' at Kleinfeld?

programme.title: E5 - The Final Spot
programme.desc: Abner Ramirez and Megan Mitchell join Joanna Gaines to help decide which of the five new bakers will move forward to the last open spot in the finale.

programme.title: E9 - Monopoly
programme.desc: Four bakers roll the dice before the judges in the hope that their cake will get to be the centrepiece at a celebration of the iconic board game. And wins them $10,000!

programme.title: E4 - Going For Butter Gold
programme.desc: Stephanie Boswell and Ludo Lefebvre task the bakers with creating buttery mashups inspired by Julien Abourmad and Emmanuel Gunther's 'cruffin.'

programme.desc: Host Terry Crews challenges 31 of the remaining 32 home cooks with a gameday grub competition and a cook's choice battle.

programme.title: E9 - Monopoly
programme.desc: Four bakers roll the dice before the judges in the hope that their cake will get to be the centrepiece at a celebration of the iconic board game. And wins them $10,000!

programme.title: E9 - Monopoly
programme.desc: Four bakers roll the dice before the judges in the hope that their cake will get to be the centrepiece at a celebration of the iconic board game. And wins them $10,000!

programme.title: E1 - Omni-Copped
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: E3 - Moor Fogg
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: E4 - Rath Of Con
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: E1 - The Prince And The Valiant Quest
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain.

programme.title: E2 - The Prince And The Chicken Of Doom
programme.desc: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead.

programme.title: E4 - The Prince And The Tears Of Triumph
programme.desc: In an effort to impress Jezebel the thiefstress, Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off to find the elusive Centicore.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: E6 - Speechless On The Seine
programme.desc: While in Paris, France, Ben catches Zombozo robbing the Louvre, but when Zombozo hypnotizes Ben to remain speechless, Ben must navigate a foreign land like a mime in order to stop the criminal clown and his travelling circus.

programme.title: E7 - Poles Apart
programme.desc: A trip to the South Pole goes upside down when Team Tennyson lands on the North Pole instead, but Ben quickly discovers the culprits: Solar & Polar Twain, magnetically-powered scientists who want to hold the world ransom by threatening to reverse Earth's magnetic poles!

programme.title: E10 - Big In Japan
programme.desc: During a tour of the Japanese Robotics Museum, Ben finds hero-gone-wrong Tim Buktu 'trying to save' Tokyo from a Dragon, but has Tim finally turned over a new leaf, or is this just another one of his half-baked plans to play the part of hero?

programme.title: E3 - Emilia Carr
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: E4 - Linda Carty
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Malaysian Drug Mules
programme.desc: Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.

programme.title: E5 - A Krazy Killing
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: E134
programme.desc: A defendant strips naked and shadowboxes during his hearing; the family of a murder victim attacks the defendant in court; a convicted gunman begs for forgiveness from a victim's family; and more.

programme.title: E491 - Innocents Lost
programme.desc: When a house fire turns out to be a triple murder involving a 7-year-old girl, Tulsa Homicide takes it personally.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: E5 - A Magical Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join Mila and Morphle for a series of magical birthday adventures! They rescue a stolen magic pet for Winston, celebrate Morphle's own birthday when bandits steal the ice cream truck, and help Jordie get his cactus cake back from Orphle.

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E12 -Let's Eat Healthy Food!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers explore everything about healthy food: where it comes from, where we can buy it, trying new foods, and how it helps us get energy, stay healthy, and grow strong!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: Air Asia Buds Adventures S1E1 -High-Flying Fun!
programme.desc: It's time for a high-flying adventure with the Air Asia Buds! Join them as they explore a busy fire station, visit a fun-filled farm, & learn all about amazing animals. Their journey takes them to incredible destinations around the world, from the vibrant streets of Bangkok & the beautiful beaches of the Philippines to the bustling city of Kuala Lumpur. It's a non-stop trip full of fun, learning, & discovery.

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: E14 - Baby John's Birthday Blocks
programme.desc: Join Baby John for a day of birthday fun! He gets new building blocks, figures out the shapes of his presents, and has a messy party in the park. Plus, his sister Jill celebrates her birthday on a pink party bus!

programme.title: E3 - A BIG Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for Emmy the elephant's birthday! Play a game of musical chairs, go on a submarine ride to see colorful sharks, and help rescue Mochi's rubber ducky at the beach. It's an animal-filled day of fun and adventure!

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E4 -Feel Big Feelings!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers navigate big feelings with stories and songs, helping kids recognize and name emotions like happy, angry, and sad. We learn that all feelings are okay, and that they can change too!

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E12 -Let's Eat Healthy Food!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E4 - Super Relaxing Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.desc: It's time for a high-flying adventure with the Air Asia Buds! Join them as they explore a busy fire station, visit a fun-filled farm, & learn all about amazing animals. Their journey takes them to incredible destinations around the world, from the vibrant streets of Bangkok & the beautiful beaches of the Philippines to the bustling city of Kuala Lumpur. It's a non-stop trip full of fun, learning, & discovery.

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: E5 - A Magical Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join Mila and Morphle for a series of magical birthday adventures! They rescue a stolen magic pet for Winston, celebrate Morphle's own birthday when bandits steal the ice cream truck, and help Jordie get his cactus cake back from Orphle.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E3 - A BIG Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for Emmy the elephant's birthday! Play a game of musical chairs, go on a submarine ride to see colorful sharks, and help rescue Mochi's rubber ducky at the beach. It's an animal-filled day of fun and adventure!

programme.title: E10 - JJ's Day of Birthday Wishes!
programme.desc: Join JJ, Cody, CeCe, and Nina for a day full of birthday celebrations! From a dinosaur-themed party to a fun piÃ±ata surprise and a magical party in the clouds, it's a whirlwind of cake, games, and presents for everyone.

programme.title: Air Asia Buds Adventures S1E1 -High-Flying Fun!
programme.desc: It's time for a high-flying adventure with the Air Asia Buds! Join them as they explore a busy fire station, visit a fun-filled farm, & learn all about amazing animals. Their journey takes them to incredible destinations around the world, from the vibrant streets of Bangkok & the beautiful beaches of the Philippines to the bustling city of Kuala Lumpur. It's a non-stop trip full of fun, learning, & discovery.

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E14 - Baby John's Birthday Blocks
programme.desc: Join Baby John for a day of birthday fun! He gets new building blocks, figures out the shapes of his presents, and has a messy party in the park. Plus, his sister Jill celebrates her birthday on a pink party bus!

programme.title: E5 - A Magical Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join Mila and Morphle for a series of magical birthday adventures! They rescue a stolen magic pet for Winston, celebrate Morphle's own birthday when bandits steal the ice cream truck, and help Jordie get his cactus cake back from Orphle.

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E3 - A BIG Birthday Surprise!
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for Emmy the elephant's birthday! Play a game of musical chairs, go on a submarine ride to see colorful sharks, and help rescue Mochi's rubber ducky at the beach. It's an animal-filled day of fun and adventure!

programme.title: E5 - David Walliams
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with David Walliams, David is taken way out of his comfort zone, on a journey across one of Devon’s most spectacular and rugged valleys.

programme.title: E1 - Bangkok
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!
programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E4 - Entering the Wolf Den & Wild Deer Carcass Feeding Frenzy!
programme.desc: Coyote meets rescued foxes, then feeds a deer carcass to a pack of powerful gray wolves!

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!

programme.desc: Coyote meets rescued foxes, then feeds a deer carcass to a pack of powerful gray wolves!

programme.title: E1 - The Setup
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and adventurer, Peter Jago, and his team are on a mission to search for alluvial diamonds and gemstones washed in the hidden river valleys of Lesotho.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.desc: Entrepreneur and adventurer, Peter Jago, and his team are on a mission to search for alluvial diamonds and gemstones washed in the hidden river valleys of Lesotho.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E1 - Bangkok
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!
programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E4 - Entering the Wolf Den & Wild Deer Carcass Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: In The Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: E3 - Face The Music
programme.desc: An unfortunate development finds George's new rail station under threat. Despite Agnes' warnings, Marian continues to see Mr. Raikes, who lays his ambitions bare.

programme.title: Trust
programme.desc: After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet retreats to a remote cabin – but betrayal by the man she trusted sparks a brutal game of survival.

programme.title: Liberty: Mother Of Exiles
programme.desc: Follow legendary designer Diane von Furstenberg, in her quest to discover how sculptor Auguste Bartholdi's dream became a reality and what the Statue of Liberty means to people around the world.

programme.title: In The Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: Up-and-coming U.S. marshal Teddy Daniels is assigned to investigate the disappearance of a patient from Boston's Shutter Island Ashecliffe Hospital.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Based on George R.R. Martin’s “Fire & Blood,” the series, set 200 years before the events of “Game of Thrones,” tells the story of House Targaryen.

programme.title: Liberty: Mother Of Exiles
programme.desc: Follow legendary designer Diane von Furstenberg, in her quest to discover how sculptor Auguste Bartholdi's dream became a reality and what the Statue of Liberty means to people around the world.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: Up-and-coming U.S. marshal Teddy Daniels is assigned to investigate the disappearance of a patient from Boston's Shutter Island Ashecliffe Hospital.

programme.title: E707 - The Flying Contest
programme.desc: AJ is entering in the Axle City Flying Contest. But when Crusher sends him and Blaze away, they must get back in time for AJ to build his super-cool flying invention!

programme.title: E318 - Pups In A Jam / Pups Save A Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: E120 - The School Fete
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the school fair, and do lots of stuff while they're there. Peppa and her friends get their faces painted as tigers.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E203 - Croc Forgot
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile comes up with a genius system to remember things, but can't remember how it works.

programme.title: E244 - The Toy Cupboard
programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys. Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard, but it needs to be assembled – and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not good at DIY.

programme.title: E203 - Croc Forgot
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile comes up with a genius system to remember things, but can't remember how it works.

programme.title: E101 - Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E619 - Pups Save The White Wolf
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them.

programme.title: E102 - Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E710 - The Baby Robot From Outer Space
programme.desc: Special Mission Blaze is on the case! When the Baby Robot from Outer Space turns everyone into babies, it's up to Blaze and his new Special Mission Modes to save the day! Can he rescue his friends, or will he be the next baby on the block?

programme.title: E122 - The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Peppa loses her tooth, so she puts the tooth under the pillow for the Tooth Fairy, but she worries that she might be mean.

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E201 - Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E614 - Pups Save A Bat Family / Pups Save A Mud Monster
programme.desc: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the Pups have to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though! // Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

programme.title: E104 - The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: E14 - Simone Pheulpin/Julian Klausner/Sophie Brillouet
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: 6H Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: E40 - The Box Of Nightmares
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: E50 - The African Civet
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: E4 - The Underwater Battleground Of Newfoundland
programme.desc: Sam and Mario set off in search of the ships torpedoed by the Germans just off the Newfoundland coast during the Second World War.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts:2025-2026
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: 6H Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: E45 - On The Trail Of The Wolf
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E51 - Here's A Musk Ox
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E1850
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: E3025-333
programme.desc: In a snowy village in Niigata, winter lingers. As spring slowly unfolds, people find joy in wild herbs, home-cooked meals, and life in nature--while cherishing traditional houses restored by Karl.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: E2102-055
programme.desc: Kasai is a bay side town in eastern Tokyo bounded by two large rivers. Join us as we trace its history as a hub of water transport, go river fishing, and get to know the local Indian community.

programme.title: E2103-040
programme.desc: Mongolia's culture of meat-eating is contributing to health problems in this developing economy - chef Suzuki Yuko aims to introduce more vegetables through workshops and improved hospital menus.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E3 - The Acacia Loop
programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.title: E6 - Crocodile Capers
programme.desc: Strap in for Dr. Amanda’s risky attempt to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, chase down blue monkey Indigo while unrest ensues among the vervets. Examine an eagle owl with bumblefoot and say adieu to Sheila the croc, who’s headed back to the wild.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible World
programme.desc: Dive into a dazzling world beyond human perception, where animals use their super senses to detect light we can’t see, sound we can’t hear and even stranger forces we can’t begin to detect.

E8
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E62
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E10 - 求職者吐槽進大廠的落差
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: Three
programme.desc: Zhau is a young doctor who desperately needs a successful operation on a high-profile patient to redeem a previous failure which not only cost the life of a patient but her self-esteem. Han is a suspect of multiple armed robberies and homicides, who has been taken to the hospital after being shot with a bullet in his head during a showdown with the police. Officer Lok is at first sight a gung-ho policeman who has participated in the showdown, but when he makes desperate attempts to do Han in by exploiting Zhau's weaknesses, it is apparent he is harboring a much darker secret...

programme.title: The Pioneer
programme.desc: It tells the tale of Li Da Zhao's revolutionary deeds from 1912 to 1927, and the stories of human beings with lofty beliefs and innovative pioneers underneath his management who devoted themselves to the awesome cause of Marxism.

programme.title: Dr. Coto's Clinic 2022
programme.desc: Shikina Island is a beautiful island located on the western edge of Japan. Kensuke Goto (Dr. Coto) came from Tokyo 19 years ago to this isolated island, 6 hours by ferry from the mainland. Since then, he has been the only doctor on the island and has borne the responsibility for the lives of all its residents. Over the years, the islanders have come to trust Coto, and Coto has come to trust them. He has become an irreplaceable presence and family member to all. A few years ago, he married Ayaka Hoshino, a nurse who has supported Coto for many years, and Ayaka is now seven months pregnant. Together with Ayaka's parents, Shoichi and Masayo, fisherman Gori Hara, former head fisherman Shigeo and his friends, Mariko, who runs a bar, and Wada, who helps out at the clinic, they live a peaceful life on the island. Now in 2022, Shikina Island, like many other rural areas in Japan, is experiencing depopulation and aging. Despite this somewhere in the back of their minds the islanders

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: Today contestants must utilise an air fryer to bring the judges a dish worthy of the Top 10. The winner will score a $5,000 Harvey Norman voucher to help deck out their kitchen.

programme.title: E39
programme.desc: The top nine contestants compete across two rounds for a chance at winning immunity. In Round 1, contestants are split into three teams of three and must choose their champ to represent the team.

programme.title: E6 - Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: The contestants have a day to take in the sights of Doha to inspire their fine dining degustation menu when the six cooks still on the hunt for immunity will cook at the Michelin starred IDAM restaurant.

programme.title: E391
programme.desc: Becky Anderson explores diverse perspectives and explains global issues of the day.

programme.title: E130
programme.desc: Kaitlan Collins goes straight to the source for the best reporting on the day's biggest stories.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.
